item.title: JohnDugganSport: John Duggan @JohnDugganSport · 4min If you are in the Carlow area, Grand National winners ‘I Am Maximus’ and ‘Soldier In
item.description: John Duggan @JohnDugganSport · 4min If you are in the Carlow area, Grand National winners ‘I Am Maximus’ and ‘Soldier In Milan’ are parading through Leighlinbridge this evening. Starting at The Lord Bagenal Inn at 5pm. 1 96

item.title: ChrisPoole___: Chris Poole @ChrisPoole___ · 27min All in all, not been the greatest week for the great game Cita Racing Post @RacingPos
item.description:

item.title:
irishracing: irishracing.com @irishracing · 38min “We can’t have a world where we are governed by the fear of negative publicity…’
J
item.description:
irishracing.com @irishracing · 38min “We can’t have a world where we are governed by the fear of negative publicity…’
Johnny Ward speaks openly on this week’s Irish Angle about the public perception of horse racing 1 426
